title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Paytm

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Paytm
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Paytm in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Paytm:
Paytm is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm!
